documents.subject: FastAPI
documents.base_query: Before FastAPI added Python 3.14 support, what was the newest explicitly supported Python line?
documents.update_query: After FastAPI added Python 3.14 support, what became the newest explicitly supported Python line?
documents.retention_query: After FastAPI added Python 3.14 support, which previous newer Python line still remained supported?
documents.base_value: Python 3.13 was the newest explicitly supported Python line in the release notes

documents.subject: FastAPI / Pydantic
documents.base_query: Before the FastAPI cleanup, could the same app use both Pydantic v2 models and pydantic.v1 models?
documents.update_query: What changed for direct Pydantic v1 support in later FastAPI releases?
documents.retention_query: Which Pydantic generation still remains the supported migration target in later FastAPI guidance?
documents.base_value: supports both Pydantic v2 models and pydantic.v1 models at the same time in the same app

conflicts.query: During the FastAPI migration window, what kind of pydantic.v1 path still existed inside Pydantic v2?
conflicts.must_contain: partial support for Pydantic v1 from inside of Pydantic v2

conflicts.query: Is pydantic.v1 supported in Python 3.14 and above during FastAPI migration?
conflicts.must_contain: not supported in Python 3.14 and above
